consent.title: Cookie preferences
consent.body: Analytics stays off until you allow it. Marketing pixels stay disabled unless you explicitly enable them.
hero.title: Your clearest path to foreigner-friendly jobs in China.
hero.subtitle: Track visa-ready roles, discover verified employers, and manage every application in one place.
profile.title: Profile
profile.guestBody: Sign in to view your profile hub, dashboard shortcuts, and role-specific actions.
profile.hubBody: This profile hub is the stable destination for account context. Use it to jump into the correct dashboard and role-specific pages.
settings.title: Account settings
settings.preferencesBody: Placeholder for display name, preferred locale, and dashboard defaults.
settings.securityBody: Placeholder for password rotation, stored AI key controls, and future 2FA settings.
privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.body: Privacy policy placeholder. Document data handling, tracking consent, retention, and candidate document access rules here.
terms.title: Terms
terms.body: Terms placeholder. Add platform usage, employer obligations, candidate conduct, and liability terms here.
footer.address: Easylink Tower, Tianhe District, Guangzhou, China
footer.tagline: easylinkjobs helps candidates, recruiters, and admins move faster with a cleaner workflow.
